summary: The deterministic read looks directionally right; the deck's speed is slightly more threatening than the raw curve implies because its fast mana and tutor density compress setup time.

power.rationale: Fast mana, tutors, and combo evidence point to a higher practical ceiling than the baseline score alone.

speed.rationale: The deck can present pressure faster than its average mana curve suggests.

interaction.rationale: The deterministic interaction score already captures the removal and stack interaction package.

consistency.rationale: Tutors and card draw support the current consistency read without needing an adjustment.

salt.rationale: Salt drivers are already visible in the deterministic evidence.

social_friction.rationale: Compact combo and disclosure-required patterns deserve a stronger Rule 0 warning.

friction_drivers.label: Compact combo disclosure
friction_drivers.explanation: The deck should disclose its compact combo timing before the game starts.

rule_zero_talking_points.prompt: This deck can threaten a compact combo finish; agree on whether that timing fits the pod.
Call out the detected Game Changers before mulligans.

recommendations.title: Lead with combo timing
recommendations.detail: Keep the deterministic bracket call visible and explain whether the compact combo is the primary plan or a backup finish.
